name: Xbox 360 Arcade Stick
notes: 59-byte descriptor. Source: DJm00n/ControllersInfo xusb_arcadestick. Real arcade stick subtype: 10 buttons, hat, no axes. Routes through hidmaestro_xusb.inf XUSB companion (matches xbox-360-wired path); no xinputhid driver mode (would force 16-button gamepad layout, breaking subtype fidelity).
